findings.claim: The experiment does not establish why the Transformer outperforms CRF
findings.failure_mechanism: The design focuses on comparative performance rather than causal analysis of model differences
findings.evidence_test: Ablation and probing experiments could provide insight into the reasons for performance differences

findings.claim: Results may not generalize to other entity types or languages
findings.failure_mechanism: The experiment is scoped specifically to follow-up recommendation extraction in English-language radiology reports
findings.evidence_test: Testing on diverse entity types or languages could validate broader generalizability

findings.claim: Production deployment utility is not guaranteed
findings.failure_mechanism: The experiment does not include downstream user studies or failure analysis
findings.evidence_test: Conducting user studies and failure analysis in a production setting could validate practical utility

critic_r1_output.summary: The experiment design is thorough and well-controlled, with appropriate measures to test the hypothesis and evaluate model performance. No significant methodological flaws were identified.

adjudicator_output.case_rationale: no advancing findings from critic R1
